title: NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Goa. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class M.Tech. / Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Mechanical Engineering
qualification.details: First class M.Tech. / Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Mechanical Engineering.

salary_details.details: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree Rs. 70,000/- per month with Ph.D. Degree

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIT Goa Faculty on Temporary Basis (Mechanical Engineering) posts is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class M.Tech. or Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Mechanical Engineering to be eligible for these faculty positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Faculty on Temporary Basis?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the Faculty on Temporary Basis (Mechanical Engineering) positions at NIT Goa.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 50,000/- per month for candidates with a Master's degree to Rs. 70,000/- per month for those with a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIT Goa Faculty on Temporary Basis (Mechanical Engineering) posts must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these faculty positions will primarily involve an Interview (Offline).

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Goa located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Goa is located in Cuncolim, Goa, with the pincode 403703.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Faculty positions advertised by NIT Goa are on a temporary basis, meaning they are contractual appointments.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of NIT Goa is also provided there.
